verdict_reasoning: KLK2 is a classical soluble serine protease secreted via the canonical ER-Golgi pathway into body fluids (serum, urine, cerebrospinal fluid). It lacks a transmembrane domain, GPI anchor, covalent or wash-resistant TM-partner tethering, and any documented PM pool. No surface biotinylation or flow-cytometric detection. Not a TM-precursor; no documented cancer ecto-display, cell-death surface translocation, germline restriction, or dual localization. Soluble secreted proteins detected in distant body fluids with no evidence of PM anchoring classify as secreted_only.
